prompt: Create a wide anime-style action illustration on a plain white or transparent-looking background showing exactly 4 overlapping duplicate copies of the same female fantasy knight, staggered horizontally from left to right like a motion trail. The character is a blonde female holy knight sprinting or lunging to the right with her body leaning forward, long golden blonde hair streaming backward in wind-swept ribbons, and a large deep royal blue cape with ornate gold trim billowing dramatically behind her. She wears polished white-silver plate armor with gold accents over a navy blue skirt and bodice, white armored boots and gauntlets, and decorative gold filigree details; a white sash or cloak strip with gold embroidery waves across the middle of the composition. In the foremost rightmost copy, she holds a long silver sword angled diagonally across the front, with a gold crossguard and fantasy knight styling. The 4 duplicated figures should be nearly identical, partially occluding each other, creating a layered cutout/sticker effect and emphasizing fast movement. Use crisp clean line art, high-detail anime fantasy game character rendering, bright highlights on metal armor, elegant blue-and-gold color palette, dynamic flowing cloth and hair, minimal shadows, no scenery, no text, no border, centered composition in a 3:2 horizontal canvas. Add a small opaque pale beige square over the visible face area of the foremost rightmost character, hiding the face while leaving the rest of the figure intact.
